data.title: Fidelity Lets Investors Directly Invest in Crypto Through New Retirement Plan
data.description:
• Fidelity has launched a no-fee crypto IRA that allows U.S. adults to invest in bitcoin, ether and litecoin.
  • The retirement product comes amid growing demand from clients for tax-advantaged crypto investment options.
  • Financial advisors are showing increased interest in crypto ETFs, with most leaning toward crypto equity exposure, according to a survey by TMX Vetta Fi.

data.title: Ripple Integrates RLUSD Stablecoin Into Cross-Border Payments System
data.description:
• Ripple has integrated its stablecoin, RLUSD, into its cross-border payments system called Ripple Payments.
  • Stablecoins are a rapidly growing asset class. Ripple entered the increasingly competitive market in December after gaining regulatory approval by NYDFS.
  • RLUSD's growth is "outpacing our internal projections" and the company is collaborating with NGOs to explore stablecoins for aid distribution, Ripple's stablecoin head Jack McDonald said.

data.title: 7-Eleven Begins Accepting Bank of Korea’s Digital Currency in CBDC Trial
data.description:
• 7-Eleven is testing South Korea’s central bank digital currency in a major trial.
  • Shoppers with accounts at seven banks can use a QR code to pay at checkout with the CBDC.
  • A 10% discount is offered for purchases made with the digital currency during the trial to incentivize adoption.

data.title: New FTX EU Owner Backpack Initiates Customer Claims Process
data.description:
• Crypto trading firm Backpack, which bought the European arm of bankrupt exchange FTX, has begun the process for customers to claim their funds.
  • Backpack has not offered any detail on when it expects to commence distributing funds.
  • Backpack's acquisition of FTX EU was criticized by the bankruptcy estate of the broader FTX entity.

data.title: Tron's Justin Sun Bailed Out TUSD as Stablecoin's $456M Reserves Were Stuck in Limbo, Filings Show
data.description:
• Filings by Techteryx say TrueUSD had a $456 million hole in its balance sheet from 2023 to early 2024 after its reserves were stuck in investments it couldn't redeem.
  • These investments are said to be largely illiquid and involve loans to resource development projects in emerging markets.
  • Despite publicly distancing himself from the stablecoin, only acting as an advisor, Tron founder Justin Sun provided crucial funding to stabilize TUSD and maintain user confidence amidst the liquidity and reserve turmoil.

data.title: Bitfarms Secures Up to $300M from Macquarie to Launch Panther Creek HPC Project
data.description:
• The two-year facility, with 8% annual interest, transitions from parent-level to project-level financing upon milestone completion.
  • Funds will accelerate Bitfarms’ strategic shift into high-performance computing, backed by strong infrastructure and proximity to major U.S. metros.
  • Macquarie receives equity warrants as part of the deal; financing structure avoids equity dilution and ensures capital flexibility.

data.title: Grayscale Lists Two New Bitcoin ETFs Offering Income From BTC Volatility
data.description:
• Grayscale listed two new exchange-traded funds that offer investors a differentiated source of income through BTC's characteristic volatility.
  • The Bitcoin Covered Call ETF (BTCC) and Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (BPI) offer covered call writing strategies.
  • Despite increased institutional investment in BTC through ETFs from Grayscale and its rivals, the volatility of bitcoin does not appear to be going anywhere.

data.title: Japanese Banking Giant SMBC Explores Stablecoin Use With Ava Labs, Fireblocks
data.description:
• Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group (SMBC) is collaborating with Ava Labs, Fireblocks, and TIS to explore stablecoin commercialization in Japan.
  • The partnership aims to develop a framework for stablecoin issuance and circulation, including use cases like settling tokenized financial assets.
  • Stablecoins are becoming increasingly popular for global payments as nations like Japan lay down regulations for the asset class.

data.title: China on Watch After U.S. Government Embrace of Bitcoin: Grayscale
data.description:
• China easing crypto restrictions could boost bitcoin adoption globally, said Grayscale in a new report.
  • The treatment of bitcoin and public blockchain technology as strategically important by the U.S. could compel other nation states to reconsider their crypto policies
  • Local regulators may be taking another look at the legal treatment of cryptocurrencies in China, the asset manager said.

data.title: Creators of DeFi Firm Aave Simplify Its Family Self Custody Wallet
data.description:
• Family Wallet allows users to manage assets across various Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) networks, using passkeys, like fingerprint or face scans, tied to a user’s device.
  • Avara has also released a ConnectKit function aimed at developers who want to integrate the Family Wallet
